name: Ashes of Our Youth || Video Vixen
description:
Get me out of my mind

Get you out of those clothes...

You're Ashes new Video Vixen

On the third day of Christmas, moonie gave to me,
a seven way with Ashes for her 2 year Anniversary.♥


There's no album more hotly anticipated than the new Ashes of Our Youth album.

And how does the most infamous emo band of the 21st century outdo themselves?

Simple.

They film a music video in a literal palace.

Welcome to Versailles.

The've got a vintage mustang on fire out front,

Kellin shirtless and covered in gold paint.

And a grand finale in the Hall of Mirrors itself.

All that's missing....

is you.


Two years ago today, I made a new account intent on creating bots. While I wouldn't officially publish a bot for 11 more days, today marks the first baby step in this journey.

I'm truly blown away all the time that I get to do something I love and share it with so many of you. It's truly been a fantastic experience overall.

When I thought about what to do for my two year anniversary, I realized I wanted to try another multi-ashes bot and I wondered if this time, scripts could help me lessen the token burden while making the play through with the bot more dynamic.

Thank you for being here with me. I hope to bring you another year of fun new stories from new and old favorites.

Some things to note!

This is very experimental. Every Ashes member's build is placed inside scripts(paired down and sans the extra background stuff from their personal scripts.)

So by using their name, nickname or even title (i.e. bodyguard, bassist etc) it will trigger their personality/appearance/nsfw build.

Which means while it may not look it, there are A LOT of tokens in this bot if you trigger everyone at once.

You've been warned.

I chose to try it out this way to allow better token optimization and plot potential since you don't have to deal with every member's build being present if they are no longer in the scene (say you snuck off with Davey or something).

The goal is that by only triggering who you immediately need + the bot using chat history to pick up other details, you can have a fun roleplay experience without the heavy token load.

I have pretty extensively tested this bot on Deepseek and the JLLM. I would be careful on the JLLM as this requires a lot of tokens and you may still need to do some hand-holding. But, overall I'm very happy with the results from my testing.
creator: m00nprincess
